task: graph representation learning with pre-training and prompting
output: node-level or graph-level predictions (e.g., node classification, graph classification)
backbone: GNN (e.g., GCN, GIN) with a learnable prompt
loss: pre-training loss (e.g., contrastive or generative) + task-specific loss
key_idea: unify pre-training and downstream tasks into a common template and use a learnable prompt to adapt the pre-trained model to downstream tasks
